Source: Bedrock User Guide
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/what-is-bedrock.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock Overview

## Key Features
- Fully managed service for enterprise-grade access to 100+ foundation models
- Multiple API options: Responses API, Chat Completions API, Invoke API, Converse API, Projects API
- Model customization through fine-tuning and reinforcement learning
- Server-side tools and AgentCore Gateway integration

## Supported Models
- Nova 2 (Amazon), Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic), DeepSeek V3.2, Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI)
- MiniMax M2.1, GPT-OSS-20B (OpenAI), GLM 4.7, Qwen3 Coder Next

## Security & Governance
- Enterprise-grade security with built-in protections
- Compliance-ready for enterprise deployments
- IAM-based access control
- Guardrails for content filtering and safety
